race.comment: MOONWALK (10) looks a nice 3YO on the way up, finishing off strongly over 1600m last start. Getting out to this trip now for the first time, but the way she's been racing suggests it's no issue. Likely to get back from the draw, but can mow her rivals down and return to winning ways. PONY UP (4) got the job done over a mile last time out in easier company and has performed strongly over 2200m previously. She has enough early speed to get across from the wide draw and she'll take plenty of catching if she can find the front. STARTLING STAR (8) just missed when an odds-on chance over this track and trip before the break and she looks primed here fourth-up into the campaign. Pike takes control now, and it wouldn't surprise to see her swooping late in the race. DUCHEES DEMERIT (1) has to be included after closing well last time out. PRINCE EPAULETTE (5) can make his presence felt out in trip.
